items.title: Claude Code 2.1.206: /cd path suggestions, /doctor learns to trim CLAUDE.md, push auto-allowed in /commit-push-pr
items.why: Point release on the harness you're sitting in; the new /doctor check that flags derivable CLAUDE.md content is worth one run on any long-lived repo.

items.title: MCP reference servers: dated cut 2026.7.10
items.why: The reference servers ship straight into agent configs — if you pin filesystem/fetch/git, diff this dated release before bumping.

items.title: llama.cpp b9949 — five releases this week, Adreno cluster-parallel decode lands
items.why: Local-inference cadence is near-daily again; if you target the server API, smoke-test against the weekly bundle instead of chasing every tag.

items.title: OpenHands 1.11.0: agent profiles land on the SaaS backend, repo metadata in traces
items.why: Open-source harness pushing observability — repository metadata on traces is a pattern worth stealing for your own agent telemetry.

items.title: Gemini CLI crosses 0.50.0: tool-registry discovery, release-verification hardening
items.why: The third harness keeps converging on the same agent-UX patterns — tool discovery via registry is the one to skim.

items.title: Profiling PyTorch attention: guess first, then look
items.why: Deep cut: a disciplined profiling method across math/efficient/flash/cuDNN backends — the 'predict before you trace' habit transfers to any inference-perf work.
